'''Nibiru''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], which also boasted at least one large [[lake]].<ref name="YS" /> It was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Kakani sector/Legends|Kakani sector]].<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] crash-landed on Nibiru, which prompted the [[mission to Nibiru]].<ref name="YS" />
{{Noncanonend}}

==Behind the scenes==
Nibiru shares its name with a real-life hoax involving a supposed planetary object known as "[[Wikipedia:Nibiru cataclysm|Nibiru]]," or "Planet X," which was speculated by some groups to collide with [[Wikipedia:Earth|Earth]] in an apocalyptic cataclysm. The name [[Wikipedia:Nibiru_(Babylonian_astronomy)|Nibiru]] itself comes from Babylonian astronomy where it is the star of Marduk often identified with Jupiter.
